acceptance_targets: [chapter_06_craft_01] Pass if, in the revised counterparts to snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:69, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:111, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:155, at least one recorder segment is followed by a present-train action or consequence rather than an immediate domestic-memory analogue, and the witness material retains independent weight instead of always being folded back into Marisol's family archive.

[chapter_06_prose_01] Pass if the revised closing span after snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:177 delivers a single clear articulation of Marisol's enlarged motive and at least one concrete carry-forward action, and fail if the ending still contains multiple paragraph-level paraphrases of the same realization after the names list has already made it legible.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if, in the revised counterparts to snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:69, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:111, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:155, at least one recorder segment is followed by a present-train action or consequence rather than an immediate domestic-memory analogue, and the witness material retains independent weight instead of always being folded back into Marisol's family archive.
findings.evidence: snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:69 routes Amparo's testimony through Marisol's intake categories and immediately into a childhood pocket-memory; the same testimony-to-domestic-memory braid repeats at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:111 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:155.
findings.problem: The middle of the chapter settles into a visible template: witness detail, then Marisol's matching family-memory analogue, then generalized insight. Because that pattern recurs three times, the recorder material starts feeling processed through Marisol rather than allowed to widen the chapter on its own terms. That weakens the collective enlargement the chapter is supposed to achieve.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework at least one turn in the braid around snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:69, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:111, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:155 so a testimony segment lands in present-scene pressure instead of immediately triggering another domestic parallel. Strategy options: let one witness account stand without a family-memory echo, interrupt one recording beat with a live train-duty consequence, or move one memory beat later so the chapter stops feeling mechanically patterned.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised closing span after snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:177 delivers a single clear articulation of Marisol's enlarged motive and at least one concrete carry-forward action, and fail if the ending still contains multiple paragraph-level paraphrases of the same realization after the names list has already made it legible.
findings.evidence: After the concrete names list lands, the closing stretch keeps paraphrasing the same realization at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:193, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:195, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:197, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:201, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:211.
findings.problem: The chapter earns Marisol's ethical enlargement through the recorder, the written names, and the concealed pages, then mistrusts that work and explains the turn several more times in abstract thematic language. The repetition softens the ending instead of sharpening it, because the reader receives the same insight as summary, then restatement, then final thesis.
findings.rewrite_direction: Compress or recast the landing across snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:193, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:195, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:197, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:201, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:211 so the ending turns on one decisive articulation plus observable carry-forward behavior. Let the names, the hidden pages, and Marisol's resumed round do more of the closing work.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into the novel's uncomfortable overlap of sanitation, state violence, labor dependence, and family love. When an edge case appears, prefer the version that keeps physical consequence, class coercion, and emotional contradiction visible on the page rather than the version that makes characters cleaner, nobler, or easier to forgive.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene turns away at the exact moment bodily, economic, or moral consequence should become legible, revise toward specificity. Omission is only valid when residue, aftermath, and changed behavior keep the pressure fully present.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High - contractions are the spoken default; uncontracted forms should mark emphasis, bureaucracy, class performance, or character-specific formality.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate dense procedural chapters with quieter aftermath, meals, night holds, confession scenes, and dark-comic institutional theater. No two consecutive chapters should rely on the same rhythm of scene count, dialogue density, or pressure delivery; vary between confrontation, drift, revelation, ritual preparation, humiliation, public spectacle, and stillness under pressure.
prose_style_profile.diction: Concrete, infrastructural, unsentimental, and specific about procedures without becoming jargon-drunk. Abstract thought should rise from physical consequence instead of replacing it.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: Close third anchored primarily to Marisol's bodily labor, practical thought, and moral self-management, with any widening kept chapter-level and earned by scene design.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Let long freighted sentences carry labor process, institutional language, or accumulating sensory load; then cut to shorter, grammatically complete sentences at impact points where a body, fact, or decision can no longer be blurred.
